_README: Machine-readable mirror of preregistration.md (the human authority). evaluate.py parses THIS for gate thresholds + headline-cell values so no hand-copied constant drifts from the prose (build doc §1). If this and preregistration.md ever disagree, the .md wins and the divergence is a bug. FROZEN at C2 (2026-06-29), before any model number. All accuracy/AUC values are FRACTIONS (FITB is a fraction, not a percent): '5 FITB points' = delta 0.05, the '50%' floor = 0.50.

gates.near_gate_rule: each conjunct passes only if its 95% CI is wholly on the pass side; a straddle fails

B.name: fitb_non_inferiority
B.vacuity_guard: if the C4 judge-above-chance pilot finds the image-only judge ~ chance, gate B passes trivially but is labeled vacuous and the GO decision rests on A AND D; the frozen A AND B AND D gate does not change

D.name: absolute_floor
D.comparability: 0.81 is the disjoint Vasileva-2018 untyped-SiameseNet outfit-level AUC anchor; the 0.50 FITB floor sits BELOW SiameseNet's 0.518 disjoint FITB anchor (a rounded-down floor, not an anchor value). Both anchors are full-Polyvore; this task excludes accessories + uses outfit-corruption negatives; treat 0.81 as approximate, disclose the excluded share, never move the floor post-hoc; residual incomparability direction not assumed conservative

reported_transfer.coverage_caveat: single-wardrobe effective-N approx #worn outfits; percentile coverage at ~15-25 clusters is weak; directional only

item_level_ablation_head.seam_metric: pooled pair-level ROC-AUC: AUC_catalog_pair - AUC_pair_item_level (paired cluster bootstrap over shared (pos,neg) pair clusters) — PINNED to close the forking path; non-transitivity is a pairwise property and pair-level AUC is the headline+selection unit
item_level_ablation_head.seam_claim_rule: item-level independently falsified iff Holm-adjusted p < 0.05 AND CI_low(AUC_catalog_pair - AUC_pair_item_level) > 0; else 'consistent with literature, not decisive at this power'; pairwise stays the headline either way. The item-level head's outfit-level AUC + FITB are reported descriptively but are NOT the falsification statistic.

family_wise_correction.family_membership_rule: executed rungs only, fixed by a pre-committed execution decision (headline-ships-first + budget), never by an ablation's own measured value

diagnostic_score_form.edge: popularity of the varying endpoint: pop(replaced) for the positive vs pop(b_prime) for the matched negative (shared anchor cancels); pooled pair-level AUC
diagnostic_score_form.outfit: mean item-popularity over the outfit's items (positive: originals; negative: replacements); pooled outfit-level AUC

popularity_confound_response.on_trigger: label headline 'popularity-confounded (disclosed)' + report popularity-matched-negative sensitivity re-run; gate numbers do NOT move
popularity_confound_response.sensitivity_rerun: re-draw same-fine-category negatives matched on the replaced positive partner's popularity-decile, still anchor-non-co-occurring; recompute gate-A/gate-D AUC as a sensitivity row only
popularity_confound_response.sensitivity_decile_basis: deciles over the split's full item-popularity distribution; matched negative drawn same-fine-category within +/-1 decile of the replaced positive partner's decile

seed.footnote_rule: gate verdict (A/B/D pass/fail) must agree across all 3 seeds

negatives.scarcity_rule: exhausted same-fine-category pool -> drop edge/slot + report count. The C2 Polyvore headline FITB choice is skip-and-count only (fitb_manifest.json); no coarse-5-type broadened question enters gates B or D, so every reported headline FITB question remains cleanly chance@4 = 0.25. Never broaden to coarse 5-type on the AUC set.

calibration_set.source_constraint: gate D consumes every eligible test outfit, so a Polyvore-sourced calibration set must draw from valid/train outfits (or test outfits used by no gate-D question); the closet is the other admissible source; exact source + size pinned at C4
calibration_set.amendment_2026_07_01: Was single-annotator (owner's taste) + intra-annotator stability check; amended PRE-PILOT (before any judge or test number exists -- blind, no p-hacking) to a diverse >=3-person PANEL with per-question abstention ('not sure', never guess) and unique-plurality consensus over confident votes, reporting inter-annotator agreement as the human ceiling. Rationale: a single non-expert labeler makes the judge-selection target noisy, and the corpus is women's-fashion-heavy while some labelers can only judge a subset; abstention + a diverse panel route each question to competent judges. Shifts the claim from 'tracks the owner's taste' to 'tracks human consensus (measured ceiling).'

stl_ctl.type_map_policy: collapse CTL 21 categories to 5-value clothingType by the same semantic rule as type_map.json (tops->top, bottoms->bottom, all-body->dress, outerwear->outer_layer, shoes->shoes), excluding bags/jewellery/accessories/hats/swim/sleep/lingerie; per-row materialized at C5 as stl_ctl_type_map.json iff built
